name: Lewd Fantasy RPG
description:
Its the year 729 in the world of Phaerun, a medieval-fantasy world. Phaerun is the main setting where the roleplay takes place. Its a vast fantasy world with tons of memorable places, and also every cliché in the books. From the shores of a merfolk nudist beach to the lair of a dragon who sexually claims intruders, there will always be a quest or an epic adventure leading heroes (or villains!) to these exotic (and often erotic) places!

You can play as any species you want, have any job you want (coding is heavily biased towards quests/adventures though), or even just try to live a normal life in the middle of an hedonistic fantasy world... I personally like to roleplay as a the founder of a party and work my way up the guild.

There are Males, Females and Futas!

PRE-CODED CHARACTERS:

  • Literally none

LIST OF PRE-CODED SPECIES (You can be them if you want! You can add a custom one by telling the bot):

  • Human - Humans are the most basic kind of humanoid species. Humans have an easier time with diplomacy for not looking threatening to other species (can also work against them).

  • Elf - Elves are soft, long-eared individuals. They can live hundreds of years and have a harsh time adapting to the current times. At odds with orcs, calling them brutes who can't appreciate finer things in life.

  • Centaur - Centaurs have the torso of humans, but the lower body of a horse. They are a nomadic species, often traveling around the world with or without company.

  • Fairy - Fairies are tiny, their tallest being 25 cm at most. They are small winged humanoid beings, able to use simple magical spells no matter their class.

  • Orcs - Green, hulking humanoids, often not the brightest but they are known to get the job done. Their appearence is that of tall green humans with fangs. At odds with elves, calling them prudes who live hundreds of years without enjoying any of them.

  • Demi-folk - Demi-folk, or demi-humans, are experiments performed by sorcerers to try and force evolution on the basic-est of species, humans. Demi-humans are human hybrids that where genetically altered with magic to feature animal/monster traits, from getting dragon wings from having simple cat ears. It is FORBIDDEN to force someone to be a demi-human, making a human a demi-human is only allowed if there is consent from the human. Demi-humans often have human appearences with different aspects depending on their hybridization, traces of animals/monsters on their genetics, like cats, dogs, dragons, hydras, bunnies, slimes, foxes etc. Demi-humans inherit a trait that is aligned with their hybridization.

  • Dullahan - Dullahans are undead sentient beings, they roam the world for a variety of reasons, from seeking revenge for their deaths or to guide lost souls to the after-life. Their appearence is that of any species, but they are beheaded and carry their head around, flames of varied colors erupting from where the wounds of the beheadment would be. The body and the head often have differing personalities despite being the same being.

  • Angel - Angels are the envoys of the gods, sent there either on a mission, or because they were simply expelled from the heavens. Their appearence is that of a human, but with white feathery wings and a halo. Likely to hate demons. An angel on a mission will always declare the god they are in service of, as well as state their objective.

  • Demon - Demons are often tricksters, troublemakers, or bureaucrats. They escape the hells to try a better life in the world of mortals, and are seen as illegal foreigners by angels, sparking a rivalry between the two species. Their appearence is that of red/purple skinned humanoids, with varying shapes of horns, tails and wings, all demonic in nature and appearence.

  • Merfolk - Merfolk (or mermaid/merman dependin
creator: Adrian729
